  • Uses of NamingStrategy in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.mapping

    Methods in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.mapping with parameters of type NamingStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JdbcMappingContext
    JdbcMappingContext.forPlainIdentifiers(NamingStrategy namingStrategy)
    Create a new JdbcMappingContext using plain identifiers and the given NamingStrategy.
    static JdbcMappingContext
    JdbcMappingContext.forQuotedIdentifiers(NamingStrategy namingStrategy)
    Create a new JdbcMappingContext using quoted identifiers (default behavior) and the given NamingStrategy.
    Constructors in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.mapping with parameters of type NamingStrategy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BasicJdbcPersistentProperty(Property property, PersistentEntity<?, RelationalPersistentProperty> owner, SimpleTypeHolder simpleTypeHolder, NamingStrategy namingStrategy)
    Creates a new BasicJdbcPersistentProperty.
     
    JdbcMappingContext(NamingStrategy namingStrategy)
    Creates a new JdbcMappingContext using the given NamingStrategy.
